name: ChadLou's Coffee
tagline: Kailua's most serious roastery — artisan small-batch with cult-following seasonal lattes.
parking: Street parking on Hoolai or in the nearby municipal lot
talkStory: Chad is a certified Q Grader (the sommelier equivalent for coffee) and sources beans directly from Hawaiian farms. They supply beans to several restaurants around the island. Buy a bag of their house roast to take home — it's some of the best roasted-in-Hawaii coffee you'll find. Ask what single-origin they're pouring that week.
